extension.summary: Cross-platform TLS HTTP client module for Kodi add-ons.
Kodi eklentileri icin platform bagimsiz TLS HTTP istemci modulu.
extension.description: A pure Python HTTP/TLS helper that works on Kodi platforms including Android without bundled native binaries.
Android dahil Kodi platformlarinda native binary gerektirmeden calisan saf Python HTTP/TLS yardimcisi.
